Set Default Output Paths for Figures

Source: R/set_paths.R
set_paths.Rd

Registers one or more output directories that publish_fig() will automatically save to. When paths are registered, passing a bare filename (i.e. figureout.name) to publish_fig() will save the figure to every registered directory, eliminating the need for manual path construction.

Usage

set_paths(..., create = FALSE)

Arguments

...

Character. One or more directory paths.

create

Logical. If TRUE, create any directories that do not already exist. Default FALSE.

Value

Invisibly returns the registered paths.

Details

Paths are stored in the R option figureout_paths for the duration of the session. Call set_paths() with no arguments to clear all registered paths.

See also

publish_fig, set_journal

Examples

if (FALSE) { # \dontrun{
set_paths("report/assets", "figures")
# publish_fig() will now save to both directories automatically
} # }
